compounddef.title: Audio Video Remote Control Profile (AVRCP)
compounddef.innergroup: Audio Video Remote Control Cover Art Profile

briefdescription.para: AV/C subunit type, also used for unit type.
AV/C operation ids used in AVRCP passthrough commands.

detaileddescription.para: Valid for Commands: All
Valid for Commands: All
Valid for Commands: All
Valid for Commands: All
Valid for Commands: All except where the response CType is AV/C REJECTED

briefdescription.para: The UIDs on the device have changed.

detaileddescription.para: Valid for Commands: All
Valid for Commands: ChangePath

briefdescription.para: The UID provided does not refer to a folder item.

detaileddescription.para: Valid for Commands: ChangePath

briefdescription.para: The UID provided does not refer to any currently valid item.

detaileddescription.para: Valid for Commands: ChangePath, PlayItem, AddToNowPlaying, GetItemAttributes
Valid for Commands: GetFolderItems, PlayItem, AddToNowPlayer, GetItemAttributes, GetTotalNumberOfItems
Valid for Commands: GetFolderItems
Valid for Commands: Play Item, AddToNowPlaying
Valid for Commands: PlayItem, AddToNowPlaying
Valid for Commands: AddToNowPlaying
Valid for Commands: Search
Valid for Commands: Search

briefdescription.para: The specified Player Id does not refer to a valid player.

detaileddescription.para: Valid for Commands: SetAddressedPlayer, SetBrowsedPlayer
Valid for Commands: SetBrowsedPlayer
Valid for Commands: Search, SetBrowsedPlayer
Valid for Commands: GetFolderItems
Valid for Commands: ALL
Valid for Commands: All Register Notification commands
The target is currently changing state (e.g., between play/pause). Note: This status is not used for browsing commands.
The command/PDU is not supported by the target device. Note: This status is not used for browsing commands.
The requested command or PDU was processed successfully by the target device.
For control commands, it means the request was accepted. For status commands, it means the state is stable and reported successfully.
These status codes are used in AVRCP responses to indicate the result of a command.

briefdescription.para: AVRCP media types (for media element items)
AVRCP item types (for browsing GetFolderItems, etc.)
AVRCP Player Application Setting Attribute IDs.
AVRCP Player Application Setting Values for Equalizer.
AVRCP Player Application Setting Values for Repeat Mode.
AVRCP Player Application Setting Values for Shuffle.
AVRCP Player Application Setting Values for Scan.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_avrcp_notify_changed_cb_t) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t event_id, struct bt_avrcp_event_data *data)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_notify_changed_cb_t

briefdescription.para: Callback for AVRCP event notifications (CHANGED only).

detaileddescription.para: This callback is invoked by the AVRCP Target (TG) when a registered event occurs and a "changed" notification needs to be sent to the Controller (CT).
For interim and rejected error cases, the callback will trigger the notification function registered by the Controller

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The AVRCP event identifier. bt_avrcp_event_data This corresponds to one of the AVRCP event types such as EVENT_PLAYBACK_STATUS_CHANGED, EVENT_TRACK_CHANGED, etc.
Pointer to bt_avrcp_event_data structure containing the event-specific data. The content of the union depends on the event_id.

simplesect.para: The callback implementation should not block or perform heavy operations. If needed, defer processing to another thread or task.

detaileddescription.para: This function is to be called after the conn parameter is obtained by performing a GAP procedure. The API is to be used to establish AVRCP connection between devices.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to bt_conn structure.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function close AVCTP L2CAP connection.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to bt_conn structure.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Allocate a net_buf for AVRCP PDU transmission, reserving headroom for AVRCP, AVRCTP, L2CAP, and ACL headers.

detaileddescription.para: This function allocates a buffer from the specified pool and reserves sufficient headroom for protocol headers required by AVRCP over Bluetooth.

parameterdescription.para: The buffer pool to allocate from.

simplesect.para: A newly allocated net_buf with reserved headroom.

briefdescription.para: Allocate a net_buf for AVRCP Vendor-Dependent PDU transmission, reserving headroom for the Vendor PDU header in addition to AVRCP, AVCTP, L2CAP, and ACL headers.

detaileddescription.para: This function allocates a buffer from the specified pool and reserves sufficient headroom for protocol headers required by AVRCP Vendor-Dependent PDUs over Bluetooth.

parameterdescription.para: The buffer pool to allocate from.

simplesect.para: A newly allocated net_buf with reserved headroom.

detaileddescription.para: This function is to be called after the AVRCP control channel is established. The API is to be used to establish AVRCP browsing connection between devices.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to bt_conn structure.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function close AVCTP browsing channel L2CAP connection.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to bt_conn structure.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: Register AVRCP callbacks to monitor the state and interact with the remote device.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT callback function.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function gets the capabilities supported by remote device.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
Specific capability requested, see bt_avrcp_cap_t.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function obtains information that pertains to the AV/C unit as a whole.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function obtains information about the subunit(s) of an AV/C unit. A device with AVRCP may support other subunits than the panel subunit if other profiles co-exist in the device.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t opid, uint8_t state, const uint8_t *payload, uint8_t len)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_ct_passthrough

detaileddescription.para: This function send a pass through command to the remote device. Passsthhrough command is used to transfer user operation information from a CT to Panel subunit of TG.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The user operation id, see bt_avrcp_opid_t.
The button state, see bt_avrcp_button_state_t.
The payload of the pass through command. Should not be NULL if len is not zero.
The length of the payload.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the browsed player on the remote device.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The player ID to be set as browsed player.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t event_id, uint32_t interval, bt_avrcp_notify_changed_cb_t cb)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_ct_register_notification

briefdescription.para: Register for AVRCP changed notifications with callback.

detaileddescription.para: This function registers for notifications from the target device. The notification response will be received through the provided callback function.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The event ID to register for, see bt_avrcp_evt_t.
The playback interval for position changed events. Other events will have this value set to 0 to ignore.
The callback function to handle the changed notification response.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for LIST_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTRS.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for LIST_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VALS.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
Player application setting attribute ID for which the possible values should be listed (e.g., Equalizer, Repeat Mode, Shuffle, Scan).

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for GET_CURR_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

The command buffer containing the GET_CURR_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_curr_player_app_setting_val_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for SET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The command buffer containing the SET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_set_player_app_setting_val_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTR_TEXT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

The command buffer containing the GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTR_TEXT request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_player_app_setting_attr_text_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL_TEXT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

The command buffer containing the GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL_TEXT request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_player_app_setting_val_text_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for INFORM_DISPLAYABLE_CHAR_SET.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The command buffer containing the INFORM_DISPLAYABLE_CHAR_SET request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_inform_displayable_char_set_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for INFORM_BATT_STATUS_OF_CT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
Battery status value bt_avrcp_battery_status_t

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the Set Absolute Volume command to the TG.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the command, valid from 0 to 15.
The absolute volume value (0x00-0x7F).

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for GET_ELEMENT_ATTRS.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The command buffer containing the GET_ELEMENT_ATTRS request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_element_attrs_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for GET_PLAY_STATUS.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for SET_ADDRESSED_PLAYER.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The player ID to be set as addressed player.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for PLAY_ITEM.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The command buffer containing the PLAY_ITEM request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_play_item_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send AVRCP vendor dependent command for ADD_TO_NOW_PLAYING.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The command buffer containing the ADD_TO_NOW_PLAYING request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_add_to_now_playing_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends AVRCP PDU GET_FOLDER_ITEMS to the remote device.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The command buffer containing the Get Folder Items command request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_folder_items_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends AVRCP PDU CHANGE_PATH to the remote device.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The command buffer containing the Change Path command request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_change_path_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends AVRCP PDU GET_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES to the remote device.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The command buffer containing the Get Item Attributes command request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_item_attrs_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends AVRCP PDU GET_TOTAL_NUMBER_OF_ITEMS to the remote device.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
scope bt_avrcp_scope_t.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends AVRCP PDU SEARCH to the remote device.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP CT instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The command buffer containing the Search command request payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_search_cmd. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: Register AVRCP callbacks to monitor the state and interact with the remote device.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG callback function.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by the application to send the unit info response.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The response for UNIT INFO command.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by the application to send the subunit info response.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_get_caps

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by the application to send the GET_CAPABILITIES response.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.
The response buffer containing the GET_CAPS payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_caps_rsp. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, uint8_t event_id, struct bt_avrcp_event_data *data)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_notification

detaileddescription.para: This function sends a notification response from the AVRCP Target (TG) to the Controller (CT) for a previously registered event. The response can be:

listitem.para: INTERIM: Sent on the first call for the given event_id to indicate that the event is being monitored.
CHANGED: Sent on the next call for the same event_id when the event state has changed.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.
The AVRCP event ID for which the notification is sent, bt_avrcp_evt_t.
Pointer to an bt_avrcp_event_data structure containing the event-specific data. The content of the union depends on the event_id.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

listitem.para: The first successful call for a given event_id sends an INTERIM response.
The next successful call for the same event_id sends a CHANGED response.
If status is BT_AVRCP_STATUS_NOT_IMPLEMENTED, a NOT_IMPLEMENTED response is sent.
If status is any other non-SUCCESS value, a REJECTED response is sent.

briefdescription.para: Send the set browsed player response.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by the application to send the set browsed player response.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The response buffer containing the set browsed player response data.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, bt_avrcp_rsp_t result, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_send_passthrough_rsp

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by the application to send the Pass Through response.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
The response code, see bt_avrcp_rsp_t, can support 0x8(NOT_IMPLEMENTED), 0x9 (ACCEPTED), 0xA (REJECTED)

The buffer containing the PASS THROUGH command payload. The application can construct this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_passthrough_rsp. Note that the data is encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_list_player_app_setting_attrs

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.
The response buffer containing the LIST_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTRS payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_list_player_app_setting_attrs_rsp. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_list_player_app_setting_vals

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.
The response buffer containing the LIST_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VALS payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_list_player_app_setting_vals_rsp. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_get_curr_player_app_setting_val

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.

The response buffer containing the GET_CURR_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_curr_player_app_setting_val_rsp. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_get_player_app_setting_attr_text

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.

The response buffer containing the GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTR_TEXT payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_player_app_setting_attr_text_rsp. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_get_player_app_setting_val_text

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.

The response buffer containing the GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL_TEXT payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_player_app_setting_val_text_rsp. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send response for PDU ID BT_AVRCP_PDU_ID_INFORM_BATT_STATUS_OF_CT.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, uint8_t absolute_volume)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_absolute_volume

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the Set Absolute Volume response to the CT.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.
The absolute volume value (0x00-0x7F).

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_get_element_attrs

briefdescription.para: Send response for PDU ID BT_AVRCP_PDU_ID_GET_ELEMENT_ATTRS.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.
The response buffer containing the GET_ELEMENT_ATTRS payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_element_attrs_rsp. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_get_play_status

briefdescription.para: Send response for PDU ID BT_AVRCP_PDU_ID_GET_PLAY_STATUS.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.
The response buffer containing the GET_PLAY_STATUS payload, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_play_status_rsp. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send response for PDU ID BT_AVRCP_PDU_ID_SET_ADDRESSED_PLAYER.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send response for PDU ID BT_AVRCP_PDU_ID_PLAY_ITEM.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send response for PDU ID BT_AVRCP_PDU_ID_ADD_TO_NOW_PLAYING.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP TG connection object.
The transaction label of the request.
Status code of the operation bt_avrcp_status_t.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or error code.

briefdescription.para: Send the Get Folder Items response.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by the application to send the GET_FOLDER_ITEMS response.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

The response buffer containing the Get Folder Items response parameters. If the operation is successful, the application should format this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_get_folder_items_rsp. If status indicates a reject error or operation not completed, buf only contains a single status byte. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_avrcp_tg *tg, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, uint32_t num_items)
memberdef.name: bt_avrcp_tg_change_path

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by the application to send the CHANGE_PATH response.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.
Operation status (see bt_avrcp_status_t).
Number of items in the new folder (valid only if status is BT_AVRCP_STATUS_OPERATION_COMPLETED).

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Send the Get Item Attributes response.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by the application to send the GET_ITEM_ATTRIBUTES response.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

The response buffer containing the Get Item Attributes response parameters. If the operation is successful, the application should format this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_get_item_attrs_rsp. If status indicates a reject error or operation not completed, buf only contains a single status byte. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Send the Get Total Number Of Items response.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by the application to send the GET_TOTAL_NUMBER_OF_ITEMS response.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

The response buffer containing the Get Total Number Of Items response parameters. If the operation is successful, the application should format this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_get_total_number_of_items_rsp. If status indicates a reject error or operation not completed, buf only contains a single status byte. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by the application to send the SEARCH response.

parameterdescription.para: The AVRCP TG instance.
The transaction label of the response, valid from 0 to 15.

The response buffer containing the Search response parameters. If the operation is successful, the application should format this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_search_rsp. If status indicates a reject error or operation not completed, buf only contains a single status byte. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or error code in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Send General Reject response on the AVRCP Browsing channel (TG).

detaileddescription.para: This API sends a GENERAL_REJECT (PDU ID: BT_AVRCP_PDU_ID_GENERAL_REJECT) response for a specific Browsing command when the request PDU is not understood, has invalid parameters or cannot be processed generically. The browsing payload format is: PDU_ID (0xA0) + ParameterLength (0x0001) + status (1B).

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP Target instance.
Transaction label of the request (0..15).
Status code (bt_avrcp_status_t), e.g. BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_COMMAND (0x00), BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER (0x01), etc.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code on failure.
